content: Fix Google OAuth PKCE (Missing code verifier)
Stop mock data for real accounts (gate connectors + seeds to demo; keep demo alive)
Fix stale mock briefing/actions: Context Builder clears stale + regenerates briefing from REAL data on every build
Add Context Builder progress bar + auto-advance to dashboard (no refresh)
One-time rebuild for user account -> verified real briefing + real actions
ALIGN with user on phased Kaelra-first redesign (declutter/skill auto-detect, voice intro onboarding, notification-driven + Kaelra speaks, multi-account, continuous learning)
